basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in. A total of 3 Anganwadi Helper vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as on 01-01-2026
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years as on 01-01-2026 Age Relaxation: As per Govt. rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Women, Divorcee, Widow, Orphan, and Differently-abled candidates.

qualification.details: Anganwadi Helper: 12th Pass. Preference may be given to those with 5 years of experience in the concerned area. Must be a local resident.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the WCD Odisha Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Anganwadi Helper posts is 19th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of 1st January 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th standard (12th pass) to be eligible for the Anganwadi Helper position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 5,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the official WCD Odisha website by the specified last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any preference for experienced candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, preference may be given to candidates with 5 years of experience in the concerned area.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Anganwadi Helper posts.

faq.question: Q9. Is age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Women, Divorcee, Widow, Orphan, and Differently-abled candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
